mission.title: Install and Configure Drasi on Kubernetes
mission.description: Drasi is a data processing platform that simplifies detecting changes in data and taking immediate action. Installing Drasi allows you to monitor system logs and change feeds for specific events, enabling real-time actionable insights without the overhead of traditional data processing methods.

steps.title: Add the Drasi Helm repository
steps.description:
Add the Drasi Helm chart repository to your local Helm setup using the following command:
```bash
helm repo add drasi https://charts.drasi.io
helm repo update
```

steps.title: Install Drasi using Helm
steps.description:
Install Drasi in a new namespace called 'drasi' with the following command:
```bash
helm install drasi drasi/drasi --namespace drasi --create-namespace --version 1.0.0
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Check the status of the Drasi pods to ensure they are running:
```bash
kubectl get pods --namespace drasi
```

steps.title: Configure resource limits
steps.description:
Edit the Drasi deployment to set resource limits. Use the following command to open the deployment configuration:
```bash
kubectl edit deployment drasi --namespace drasi
```
Then, add the following under the containers section:
```yaml
resources:
  limits:
    cpu: "500m"
    memory: "512Mi"
```

steps.title: Set up port forwarding for access
steps.description:
Forward a local port to the Drasi service to access it:
```bash
kubectl port-forward svc/drasi --namespace drasi 8080:80
```

resolution.summary: A successful installation of Drasi will have the pods running without errors, and you will be able to access the Drasi service through port 8080 on your local machine. You can also verify that resource limits are applied by checking the deployment configuration.
codeSnippets:
helm repo add drasi https://charts.drasi.io
helm repo update

prerequisites.description: You need a Kubernetes cluster running version 1.24 or higher, along with Helm and kubectl installed on your local machine.
